Factsheet

Developer:
EIS GAMES
Based in Mexico
Release date:
Platforms:
Steam
Website:
Regular Price:
USD 9.99
MXN 123.99

Description

Break into quiet homes to steal valuable objects while solving increasingly unsettling puzzles. In this psychological escape-room experience, the biggest mystery may be your own mind.

History

Details

Fragments in Situ Nothing is exactly where it should be. In Fragments in Situ, you break into quiet homes in search of valuable objects. Each place hides secrets behind locked drawers, hidden compartments, and strange mechanisms that demand to be solved. But the deeper you go, the stranger things become. Rooms shift in subtle ways. Clues contradict each other. Puzzles feel less like obstacles and more like something… personal. As you search for valuables and piece together each environment, a question begins to surface: Are these puzzles protecting the house — or protecting you from what you're doing? Fragments in Situ is a psychological escape-room experience where observation, intuition, and doubt are your most important tools. Every solved puzzle reveals more fragments of a reality that may not be as stable as it seems. Explore carefully. Pay attention to the details. And try to trust what you see.

Features

  • Psychological Escape-Room Gameplay
  • Unsettling First-Person Exploration
  • Observation-Driven Puzzles
  • A Dark and Introspective Atmosphere

About EIS GAMES

Boilerplate
EIS GAMES is a small independent game development studio focused on creating original experiences for players. Despite its very small team, every project is developed with great care and attention to detail, emphasizing personality and passion in every aspect of the game.
